title: The Shadow of Crocodile
description: On pages 9–12, the shadow of crocodile as the crew accepts Vivi’s desperate mission, and a mysterious senior agent reminds them how dangerous Baroque Works really is.
scene: The Shadow of Crocodile. The crew accepts Vivi’s desperate mission, and a mysterious senior agent reminds them how dangerous Baroque Works really is. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Because of that Superhuman swordsman, we'd all be punished for failing in our mission anyways.

dialogue.speaker: Igaram
dialogue.text: I'd rather go down while protecting a friend...!

dialogue.speaker: Mr. 9
dialogue.text: First Mr. 9 and now you too, Ms. Monday?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I'm a human bomb that can make any part of my body explode.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: With this ability bestowed upon me by the bomb bomb fruit,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: There's not a single mission I've failed at!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You can't run away from us.

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the shadow of crocodile. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
